subject: A robed planeswalker figure unleashing a burst of crackling blue-white lightning from an extended hand, electrical arcs branching outward against a stormy sky
description: A figure in dark robes stands with arm extended, channeling a violent burst of forked blue-white lightning that branches and arcs across the composition. The energy radiates outward in jagged tendrils, lighting up a turbulent sky filled with swirling clouds and ambient electrical discharge. The palette is dominated by deep blues, electric whites, and slate greys, with hot white cores at the lightning's brightest points. The figure is mostly silhouetted by the brilliance of the spell, with hints of red-orange accents on the costume. The composition is dynamic and explosive, conveying the moment of a spell's release.
foreground: robed spellcaster channeling forked lightning from an outstretched hand
background: stormy sky with swirling dark clouds and ambient electrical discharge
emotion: intense focus, aggressive release of power
